info.paylines.title: PAYLINES
info.booster.title: Booster Bet
info.how.press_spin: Press Spin button to play the game.
info.autoplay.notice: Autoplay option may be prohibited in specific jurisdictions.
info.autoplay.start_button: Press the Autoplay button to start Autoplay instantly. Hold the Autoplay button to access additional settings.
info.autoplay.select_amount: In Autoplay settings, select the number of spins from the predefined list of options.
info.autoplay.check_button: To confirm and start autoplay with the selected settings, press the 'Check' button.
info.autoplay.set_limits: Set Loss limit and Single Win limit as preferred.
info.autoplay.loss_limit: Loss limit - autoplay will stop at the last spin before the loss limit is reached.
info.autoplay.single_win_limit: Single win limit - autoplay will stop after a win that exceeds the single win limit.
info.autoplay.stop_on_feature: Stop on Feature win - autoplay will stop when game feature is activated.
info.buttons.spin: Press the SPIN to launch the game round. The reels will spin once, and the outcome will determine your winnings based on the symbols displayed.
info.buttons.menu: The MENU button opens a panel that includes several useful options, such as Paytable, Game Info, Settings and History
info.buttons.menu.items.paytable: PAYTABLE: View the paytable to see the payout values for each symbol combination and understand the winning rules.
info.buttons.menu.items.game_info: GAME INFO: Detailed information about the game's rules and features.
info.buttons.menu.items.settings: SETTINGS: Customize your gaming experience by toggling music on or off and adjusting other preferences.
info.buttons.menu.items.history: HISTORY: View your recent spin results and win history.
info.buttons.bet: Use BET button to adjust your wager. You can increase or decrease your bet amount, which directly affects the potential payout for each spin.
info.buttons.autoplay: Activate AUTOPLAY to let the reels spin automatically. This feature is perfect if you prefer continuous play without manually clicking each spin. Hold AUTOPLAY button for additional settings.
info.buttons.turbo: Engage TURBO mode to speed up the reel animations, allowing for faster spins and a more dynamic, rapid-fire gaming experience.
info.buttons.sound: The SOUND BUTTON allows you to easily mute or unmute all game sounds at any time. Use this option to adjust the audio experience according to your personal preference.
info.buttons.buy: The BUY button allows you to enter a bonus feature immediately, without waiting for it to trigger during normal gameplay.
info.additional.p1: Malfunction voids all pays and plays. The reels are spun with a fair and certified random number generator. Certain game features and settings may be subject to the terms and conditions of the gaming site. For more information, please refer to the casino’s website regarding:
info.additional.li.unfinished_rounds: Procedures used to manage unfinished game rounds.
info.additional.li.inactive_timeout: Time after which inactive game sessions automatically end.
info.additional.li.currency: All bets and wins are shown in your account currency.
info.additional.replay: If your game is interrupted during play, you may replay the game round after restarting the game within the allowed time. Otherwise, any winnings from the interrupted game will be added to your account automatically. If you choose to skip the replay, your win will be credited immediately.
info.additional.support: In any situation where the replay functionality is not sufficient, please contact the support team of your gaming website.
info.additional.malfunction: In the event of hardware or software malfunction, all affected game bets and payouts are voided, and all affected bets are refunded.
info.additional.translation_disclaimer: This is a translation of the original game rules. In case of any discrepancy between the English and this language version, the English version shall prevail.
fps.description.ls:

fps.description.pt:

STICKY WILDS & UP TO X6 MULTIPLIERS
WITH SUUUUGOI REWARDS!
bf.cards.0.title: Suuuuugoi Free Spins
bf.cards.0.description: Enjoy 10 Free Spins with a progressive multiplier and a Sticky Wild!
bf.cards.1.title: Booster Bet
bf.cards.1.description: Increase your total bet by 1.4x to improve your chances of triggering Suuuuugoi Free Spins during base game!
info.symbol.wild.text3: Pays its own combinations according to the paytable.
info.symbol.scatter.text1: Pays anywhere on the grid in Base Game and Free Spins.
info.symbol.scatter.text2: 3 or more trigger Suuuuugoi Free Spins (always 10 spins).
info.feature.title: Free Spins, Sticky Wild & Multipliers
info.feature.text2:
At the start of the feature, 1 Sticky Wild (same payouts as regular Wild)
is placed on reel 3, row 2 and remains locked for the entire bonus.
It substitutes for all symbols except Scatter.
info.feature.text3:
Progressive multiplier applies to every win and increases by +1 every 2 spins,
regardless of whether the spins are winning or not:
info.feature.text4: x2 → x3 → x4 → x5 → x6.
info.feature.text6:
The multiplier applies to every win during the feature.
Retriggers are not available.
info.feature.text7:
The feature ends when no spins remain.
The total win is displayed and the game returns to the Base Game.
info.paylines.text2:
Wins pay left to right, starting from the leftmost reel.
Only the highest win per line is paid.
Wins on multiple lines are added together.
Line wins are multiplied by Total Bet.
Scatter wins pay anywhere (Base Game and Free Spins) and are added to line wins.
info.game.title: GAME INFO
info.game.name: Koharu’s Suuuugoi Sweets
info.game.rtp.base: Base Game RTP (Free Spins triggered naturally) - {RTP}%
info.about.title: ABOUT GAME
info.about.text: Join Koharu on a mouthwatering adventure in Suuuuugoi Sweets - a high-volatility 5×3 slot with 25 paylines, Sticky Wilds, and explosive Free Spins with progressive multipliers up to ×6! Hit the right combo of Scatters to trigger Suuuuugoi Free Spins, where a central Sticky Wild and rising multipliers stack up the sugar - and the wins!
info.rules.title: GAME RULES
info.rules.1: Played on a 5×3 grid with 25 fixed paylines.
info.rules.2: Wins pay left to right; only the highest win per line is paid; multiple line wins are added.
info.rules.3: Wild substitutes for all symbols except Scatter and appears in Base Game and Free Spins (Sticky Wild appears only during Free Spins).
info.rules.4: Scatter pays anywhere in the Base Game and also triggers Free Spins; Scatters do not appear during Free Spins.
info.rules.5: Turbo Mode and Auto Play options are available for faster gameplay.
info.rules.6: For additional technical information regarding interruptions and malfunctions, please refer to the ‘Additional Information’ section.
info.buybonus.title: BUY BONUS
info.buybonus.1: Instantly trigger Suuuuugoi Free Spins for 60× Total Bet.
info.buybonus.2: Awards 10 spins with a locked Sticky Wild (reel 3, row 2) and a progressive multiplier (x2 → x6).
info.buybonus.3: Free Spins are played with the currently selected bet.
info.buybonus.5: All feature rules are identical to a naturally triggered bonus.
info.limits.title: GAME LIMITS
info.booster.1: Booster Bet is available in the main game.
info.booster.2: Activating Booster Bet increases the player’s base bet by x1.4.
info.booster.3: Booster Bet increases the chance of triggering Suuuugoi Free Spins.
info-page.win.cap: All wins are capped at х2500.
